# Emergency Dentist Enfield

> Free same-day matching with vetted, GDC-registered emergency dentists
> across the London Borough of Enfield. Toothache, abscess, knocked-out
> tooth, broken tooth, lost filling or crown. Matched within an hour
> during opening hours.

Emergency Dentist Enfield is a free referral and matching service. We do
not perform clinical work. We connect Enfield Borough patients in genuine
dental need to GDC-registered emergency dentists who can see them the
same day. Specialists pay us a referral fee on accepted bookings; the
patient never pays a markup.

## Emergencies covered

- [Severe toothache](https://www.emergencydentistsenfield.co.uk/services/severe-toothache/): Same-day triage for sustained, sleep-disrupting tooth pain (likely pulpitis or apical periodontitis).
- [Knocked-out tooth (avulsion)](https://www.emergencydentistsenfield.co.uk/services/knocked-out-tooth/): Time-critical replantation pathway. Same-hour matching during opening hours.
- [Broken or chipped tooth](https://www.emergencydentistsenfield.co.uk/services/broken-or-chipped-tooth/): Sharp-edge stabilisation, restoration, or extraction depending on the fracture line.
- [Lost filling or crown](https://www.emergencydentistsenfield.co.uk/services/lost-filling-or-crown/): Same-day re-cementation or temporary protection of the exposed dentine.
- [Dental abscess and facial swelling](https://www.emergencydentistsenfield.co.uk/services/dental-abscess/): Drainage, antibiotic prescription where indicated, and definitive treatment of the source.
- [Evening, weekend and bank-holiday emergencies](https://www.emergencydentistsenfield.co.uk/services/out-of-hours/): Out-of-hours pathway through partner clinics with extended-hours rotas.
- [Wisdom tooth pain](https://www.emergencydentistsenfield.co.uk/services/wisdom-tooth-pain/): Pericoronitis triage, irrigation, and onward referral for surgical extraction where indicated.

## Areas served

Enfield Borough across the EN and N postcodes: Enfield Town, Bush Hill
Park, Enfield Highway, Ponders End, Edmonton, Palmers Green, Winchmore
Hill, Southgate, Cockfosters, and Hadley Wood. Coverage extends across
EN1, EN2, EN3, N9, N13, N14, N18, and N21, with secondary coverage into
the adjacent parts of Haringey and Barnet.

## Reference pages

- [About](https://www.emergencydentistsenfield.co.uk/about/): How the matching service works and why we are not a dental practice.
- [Services overview](https://www.emergencydentistsenfield.co.uk/services/): All emergency types we triage and what same-day care looks like.
- [Areas overview](https://www.emergencydentistsenfield.co.uk/location/): Catchment notes by neighbourhood.
- [Guides](https://www.emergencydentistsenfield.co.uk/blog/): Practitioner-grade writing on dental emergencies, after-hours care, and what to do before a clinic appointment.
- [Privacy](https://www.emergencydentistsenfield.co.uk/privacy/): UK GDPR privacy notice covering enquiry data, cookies, and your rights.
- [Contact](https://www.emergencydentistsenfield.co.uk/contact/): How to reach the matching service.

## Clinical scope and safety

Content is general information about dental emergencies. Nothing on the
site is clinical advice for an individual patient. For genuine medical
emergencies including uncontrolled bleeding, spreading facial swelling,
breathing difficulty, or trauma to the head and neck, call 999 or NHS 111.
We do not diagnose or treat; we introduce patients to GDC-registered
clinicians who do.
